description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a light-colored, smooth tabletop and four turned, darker wooden legs. The tabletop has a subtle wood grain pattern and a slightly beveled edge, giving it a refined yet simple appearance. The legs are cylindrical with decorative rounded feet and carved details, adding a touch of classic style. The table appears sturdy and is likely designed for everyday use in communal or work settings. Its proportions suggest it can comfortably seat four to six people. The overall design is functional and versatile, suitable for a variety of urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or indoor community spaces.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a light wood grain top and four darker, turned legs with decorative feet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the tabletop and two of the turned legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the tabletop and all four decorative legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the length and two legs.
description_view_3: Rear view, identical to the front, showing the tabletop width and all four legs.
